---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ORSYS
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
Example: "I find it difficult to..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature? How often would it be used?

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or examples that help explain your request.
